Regulation("FANR"):Havingconsidered:-Federal Law by Decree No. (6) of 2009 Concerning the Peaceful Uses of NuclearEnergy (the "Law");-Cabinet Resolution No. (17/1 g) of 2021 on Renewal of Formation of forCertification of Operations Personnel in Nuclear Facilities "FANR- REG-17";andBasedon FANR's Board of Management approval during its meeting No. (5) of 2023 heldon 16 November 2023,Hasdecided the following:Article1Toissue the revised Regulation for the Certification of Operating Personnel atNuclear Facilities (FANR-REG-17, Version 1) as provided in Annex 1 to
